text: This week we completed the first stage of development. The login flow is now simpler, the search API is connected, and the export feature mostly works. We still need better error handling before release.
label: summarize

text: The meeting covered timeline, staffing, and testing readiness. We agreed to keep the current deadline, borrow one more backend engineer for two days, and let QA focus on the payment flow first.
label: summarize

text: Our team finished the initial implementation this week. The core API is available, client integration has started, and QA has begun writing regression cases. The remaining risk is still the unresolved backend field mapping.
